arts.ttl: Brazilian forward heading to Hull City for medical after Tigers strike Fenerbahce transfer deal
arts.sum: Hull City have tied up a deal to sign playmaker Lincoln Henrique from Turkish giants Fenerbahce on an initial loan until the end of the Championship season. The 26-year-old notched three goals and two assists in 28 games before returning to Istanbul last month, but has been told he has no immediate future with Fenerbahce.

arts.ttl: Millwall star Romain Esse set for Crystal Palace medical
arts.sum: The Eagles made the 19-year-old a priority signing this winter window and have swooped early ahead of his summer release clause to beat off competition from Premier League rivals. Millwall attacker Romain Esse will have his Crystal Palace medical on Friday ahead of completing a switch across South London.

arts.ttl: Blackpool boss Steve Bruce opens up on interest in Hull City striker target
arts.sum: Steve Bruce says it would take a 'hell of an offer' to prize striker Kyle Joseph away from Blackpool, with Hull CIty understood to be keen on the Scotland Under-21 international. "It would take a hell of an offer for me to consider anything like that because Kyle epitomises what I like in a football player.

arts.ttl: Hull City moving for AS Monaco player – Could become concrete rapidly
arts.sum: When we brought news on Thursday of Hull City being on the verge of signing Nordin Amrabat, it’s fair to say the response was mixed, with ‘He’s 37!’ being the typical reaction. arts.ttl: Another player has now agreed to join Hull City – Rejection claim quickly dismissed
arts.sum: In the past week Fenerbahce attacker Lincoln has been linked with a move to Hull City, with claims on Thursday that Acun Ilicali was working to convince to join the Championship club. Hull City are looking to bring in players before the transfer deadline following their struggles in the league this season. arts.sum: Hull City have made an improved £2million offer for Blackpool striker Kyle Joseph, according to journalist Pete O’Rourke… The post Hull City lodge improved transfer bid for 23-year-old appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Hull City head coach Ruben Selles makes key transfer point as the Tigers chase more deals
arts.sum: "I think that's the most important thing because in every other side, when it arrives, especially the second part of the window, and we're still in the situation, you will try to rush things and sometimes even get a player that you don't even see or scout because you just need something there that should not be our style, that's not our style." Twelve months on from the exciting arrivals of Fabio Carvalho, Ryan Giles, Noah Ohio and Anass Zaroury, the Tigers are facing up to the stark reality of being a club mired in a relegation battle at the wrong end of the table, which naturally creates it's own problems in attracting players capable of making a positive difference and ones who fit into a club trying to work within Financial Fair Play parameters.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Tristan Crama to Millwall, Hannes Delcroix to Oxford United, Matej Jurasek to Norwich City
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Tristan Crama to Millwall, Hannes Delcroix to Oxford and Matej Jurasek to Norwich City.
